title: Smaller Crosshair (SC)
description: This resource pack converts Minecraft's original crosshair into a smaller version.
body: This resource pack reduces the size of the default Minecraft crosshair. This creates a cleaner and better experience. This resource pack for Minecraft, reduces the size of the default Minecraft crosshair to let people have a better playing experience in Minecraft. This resource pack is also usable for Minecraft pvp as the player can see more in game while still having a crosshair.
